entry.title: Did You Give My Dog Chicken?!
entry.summary:
Author: Wing1940

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,481Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 33

Summary: Richard Grayson pioneered the whole "defying the Big B" thing — first as Nightwing, then as Detective Grayson of the GCPD. Then the Red Hood fell on his head (literally), and now they're stuck playing some damn cat-and-mouse game.

entry.title: Victoria’s Secret Society of America
entry.summary:
Author: soaring_bubblegum

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,237Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: Dick, mid-kick, froze. His foot hung in the air. A flash of vibrant scarlet, impossibly delicate, peeked from beneath the waistband of Jason’s jeans. Not the tactical red of his gear, but something… lace. A tiny, ruffled edge of it, peeking out from beneath the rugged denim. A thong. Frilly. Red. The image seared itself into Dick’s brain. His breath hitched. A jolt, hot and sudden, arced through him, stunning him senseless. His balance evaporated. His elevated leg, forgotten, wobbled. He tripped over his own feet—a gasp escaping his lips—and face-planted hard into the grime-slicked asphalt.DickJay Week 2026 - Day 8 - Free Day

entry.title: blooming days
entry.summary:
Author: eutyxhia (tiramisstsu)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,931Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 9

Summary: As Jason watches Nightwing leave, Jason feels something tickle his lungs, giving him a much-unwanted coughing fit. He reaches out for the newest addition to his kit, a small thermos, and downs it in hopes of dislodging whatever has caused the sensation in the first place. Grimacing, Jason begrudgingly digs it out, catching the hint of bright purple before crushing it in palm. There’s no need for anyone to know.   Day 7 of DickJay Week 2026: Hanahaki Disease

entry.title: And your heart, love, has such darkness
entry.summary:
Author: Abraxax

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,296Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 17

Summary: DickJay Week 2026 (Day 8) Free Day | Arkham KnightJason has been imprisoned under Arkham Asylum for over a year. When he finally gets out, he sets out on the path to revenge, but things quickly spiral out of control, and he ends up without memories in the apartment of a very handsome man who says he is his brother and calls him his Little Wing. Dick Grayson treats him with such love and care that he almost doesn't notice that he is not allowed to go outside. Dick says it's dangerous, and even if he doubted him, it's not like he actually wants to go out or anything.Two weeks pass by like this before Jason gets a nightmare. He remembers Batman, Robin, and the Joker. He remembers Nightwing and how upset Dick was at Jason's own existence. He is terrified that once Dick realizes that he remembers, he will want nothing more to do with him.

entry.title: Freely Given
entry.summary:
Author: letsgooutintherain

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,679Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 49

Summary: Dick could still see it: The way Jason had gone feral, body rigid, shift washing over him, sharpening his nails to claws. Batman coming down from the rafters, taking Jason down. The absolute terror on Jason's face when he'd come back to himself, unable to make his limbs move with Batman's teeth on his neck, forcing his submission. Dick knew that in wolf gangs fights for dominance were commonly ended with teeth on necks, knew that rogues used it on their victims and some parents on their children. But for all that Dick had spent half his childhood under the roof of a wolf shifter, had fought rogues for most of his life, he had never seen a submission bite outside of a scene. He didn't know how to make this right, but he couldn't not try.

entry.title: Passion Roulette
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,137Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 27

Summary: Bruce thinks Roy is a bad influence, always hanging out with the wrong crowd, frequenting bars, and using substances, but Jason thinks Roy is just the coolest company. Jason would often make excuses to escape the cave and meet him. Sometimes, Roy takes Jason out on missions, in which Speedy and Robin II get to handle some pretty gnarly bad guys. When Roy's coded message tells Jason to sneak into the local club one day, Jason isn't prepared to find Deathstroke's apprentice on their radar. “The intel is this: this guy here,”—Roy taps the sheet of dossier with Renegade’s photo—“is visiting Gotham tonight. He’s obviously here for a mission, and we have to find out what that is.” “How do we do that?” “Easy.” Roy winks, showing a toothy, mischievous smile. “You will let him know you’re Robin.” Dickjay Week 2026 Day 8: Free Day

entry.title: one last kiss, goodnight
entry.summary:
Author: jikkyuu

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,004Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 31

Summary: He knows it won't last. He knows he shouldn't be here. It would be too good and good things aren't happening to Dick anymore; in this world, he lost his chance to make things right a long time ago.Still, he can't help but hope, just for a little while.The red Batman—and Dick knows there's another name he could call him, but it's too soon, too dangerous, too much—finally moves again. He looks around and stops to take in Gotham's vibrant skyline for a moment before returning his gaze back to Dick."Is…" His voice is hoarse, whether from disuse or emotion, Dick is not sure. "Is this a dream?"---Dickjay Week 2026 Day 6: Batman Dick/Knightfight

entry.title: Can We Go Home Now? (It's Getting Later Baby)
entry.summary:
Author: kitnotkat95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,798Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 63

Summary: Roy was a good friend, and between them and Kori they'd all been through so much weird shit that it probably wouldn't have been a big deal if Jason had told him about how he'd started sleeping with, and kind of dating, his adoptive older brother. If anything, it all just felt so new, and Jason was more than a little nervous he'd fuck the whole thing up. Ergo, if he didn't say anything about it, then Roy wouldn't ask about it, and if Jason ruined it he wouldn't have to tell Roy about that either.Or Jason hasn't told Roy and Kori he and Dick are together just yet, which wouldn't have been an issue if the latest outing of the Outlaws hadn't brought them to BludhavenFor DickJay Week Day 6 prompts: "So I'm your dirty little secret" & public sex

entry.title: Pet Diary
entry.summary:
Author: CallmeSSS

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,043Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Gotham has a crime rate that rivals its population count, police sirens are familiar background noise, and people learn not to ask too many questions.Dick Grayson and Tim Drake don't ask too many questions either.About the gray rabbit who sulks over bread.About the black cat who looks at them like he's plotting something.About why things in the apartment sometimes move on their own.They just think they're keeping pets.They're not entirely wrong.

entry.title: Lungs Over Flowers
entry.summary:
Author: soaring_bubblegum

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,888Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 82

Summary: His throat felt raw, shredded, and there was a taste in his mouth, copper and something else, something floral and sickeningly sweet. When he finally managed to pull his hand away from his mouth, gasping for air that wouldn't quite fill his lungs, there was a single petal resting against his glove. It was red. Deep, arterial red, so dark it looked black in the shadows cast by Gotham's smog-choked sky. The edges were slightly curled, delicate as tissue paper, and there was a smear of blood across its surface—his blood, he realised with a strange, detached horror. DickJay Week 2026 - Day 7 - Hanahaki Disease

entry.title: Red chrysanthemums
entry.summary:
Author: Abraxax

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,562Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 53

Summary: DickJay Week 2026 (Day 7) Gods/Goddesses | Hanahaki Disease | Hypnosis/Brainwashing |"Jason, come with me..."He wonders how he'll die this time, if the flowers will rot and fester in his lungs, taking him out in a feverish, delirious sepsis, or if their roots will simply suck up all of the oxygen in his lungs, depriving him of any kind of respite, until they suffocate him; after all, Jason is the universe's living, walking punch bag. The first time, he suffocated on hot, violent smoke that burned his nostrils, his throat, and his lungs; now, he will suffocate on flowers that make gardens out of them. At least they are pretty.His throat was itchy, and something tickled the back of it, and no matter which position he assumed, it did not go away; his chest started to hurt with each breath, and soon enough, he started coughing. The fit itself was shorter than usual, but it still hurt like hell. There was a full bloom trying to get out. A pretty red chrysanthemum, tinted burgundy due to the little droplets of blood it took from him. Deep love, mixed with pain and sorrow.

entry.title: Thicker Than Water
entry.summary:
Author: sarriathmg

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,232Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 73

Summary: “You don’t understand,” Jason hisses, unsure if he’s more pissed or sullen. “None of you idiots have ever understood.” “You’re coming with me,” Nightwing says, already reaching for the escrima sticks behind him. “I will fix you. I’m taking you with me even if I have to carry you out.”Jason wakes up chained and collared on a simple twin bed inside a locked cell. Dick has made good on his word. entry.summary:
Author: Nobyl

Summary: Convincing Jason to let Dick try to hypnotize him had been easier than Dick had expected.
